content: Sprint 2 Code Quality Review & Testing - Fix TypeScript errors and ESLint issues
Fix TypeScript errors (type mismatches, missing properties, etc.)
Fix ESLint issues (unused variables, require imports, etc.)
Test mobile responsiveness on multiple screen sizes
Validate performance optimizations (lazy loading, code splitting)
Check accessibility compliance (screen readers, keyboard nav)
Test error boundaries and error handling
Run comprehensive AI code review with Gemini Pro + O3
